TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == miduhepit i sinkicu a gangÁ•ěÁ∂ďŤÜ†Ť≥™Áė§ == miduhepit i sinkicu a gang, u teban nu singkicu a lebawa nu imelang, namaka sinkic sinuliay nu si-paw a nikasumad nu adada. miduhepit i singkicu a gang hina tahekal i tangah " pangangan han tu tangah miduhepit i sinkicu a gang, nika tahekal i dumaan nu singkicuan, mahida u namaka mataay a singkic. . teban nu singkic u singkic a nika pulungan nu si-paw, itida i mutiyungay nu cancanan nu tebanay, ngangangan mikawaway u misasiduma ( patudut, miciwkin, mikawaw) namaka udipay nu icuwacuwaay a nikataynian, mamilawpes atu miput tu udip nu makacuwaay a nikawawan, sakatahekal nu tanengay. . siukakay nu aadupan, teban a singkic itida i nikuda nu kululan, pasu punu atu duus, ipunu' i labu nu punuan, duus itida i teban nu ukak, satahap nu tangah midiputay tu punu', kulul nu ukak midiput tu duus.i nai'ay nu kululan nu aadupan mahida u mamulmulay nu aadupan atu cilekay sa, angangangan pasu biliay nu singkican a singkic nu batacan. . tademaw nu cun-su-singkic papatidengan u sakalibutan u sakapahay, picedekan u punu' pankiw mali a bangesan nu satalakaway a nikalahatan, malasingkic nu sakakaay atu satalakaway, mihusiw tu udiudipan nu sakatacuwacuwa a misungaay tu kawawan, atu ci-ti atu hekalay a milecad atu misasudanay. . miduhepit i sinkicu a si-paw u cun-su-singkic atu liwilw singkican a " caayay nu fei-sen-cin-yun-sipaw", caay ka sasuala tu dingkian. yadah ku nuheni, sakay udipan mahida tu, u singkic patideng patahekal atu sapidiputaw, itini i liwliw singkican mala suy-caw. . itini i teban nu sikicean, miduhepitay i singkican a si-paw pasu kua-tu-cia-ce-si-paw, sin-sen- cia-ce-si-paw,se-kun-si-paw atu seaw-cia-ce-si-paw, i liwliw nu singkic, miduhepitay i singkican a si-paw pasuse-wan-si-paw atu uy-sin-si-paw. malasepat ku a angangangan, (1) miliwliw tu singkican tida satu, (2) pawsa tu iyu atu yun i singkicean, (3) uynian a sikican atu duma a singkican caay ka lalitemuh, (4) milawpes tu itidaay tu mamiasik tu mapatayay a singkican. masasupaayaw ku singkic, tu-cu' malalitin atu muhanhan tu sakay udiudipan. . saan ku tademaw u miduhepit i sinkicu si-paw mikisen-cin-yun a nisausian 10:1, nika ayda a nipikinkiwan nipatahekalan mikisaba tu 1:1 a siwkian. namahida miduhepit i sinkicu si-paw idaw ku yadahay a si-paw yadahay atu kakakulian, ina miduhepit i sinkicu si-paw taneng misayadah patahekal atu mikuli tu sing-kic muculil. namahida, taneng ku nuheni macayat tu nidatengan a misingan atu misatanektek. miduhepit i sinkicu si-paw u mikinkiway tu imelangay a sitangahay a tademaw ci Lu-taw-hu. Fie-e-saw mikilim tu i punuay masaatiladay henay i tida i 1856 mihcaan makaadih. ya sasakamuen namaka Si-la a kamuan ő≥őĽőĮőĪ atu ő≥őĽőŅőĮőĪ "miduhepitay ", patucek tu nuhenian i tawya a nika tinengan u namaka singkiceay a nulian. . singkic itida i liklik nu singkican namaka nikabaludan a masakaput nu mabaluday, nu cacayay a singkican taneng miala tu cacay hatu yadahay nu singkican nikabalud, hekal nu singkican idaw ku mitabuay tu singkican, ilabu idaw ku singkic nu duhepicay sakalaliyas tu nika baludan. singkic masatawasiay u singkic mamibetas a masapucuay, ina masamibetasay masapucuay ihekalay matabuay nu miduhepit i sinkicu, mamidiput atu mamiputay. sisa inasingkic taneng patahekal tu nitungihan malucek namaka aadupan nu udip patayda i dumaan a udipan, kya taneng idaw ku mamiucul atu sasakawawan. anuhidan tu sakakawawan, u singkic taneng makakenih tu micumuday a singkic, tahekalay a singkic atu kapulungan nu singkic. anu hidan u nikitidaan, u singkic nu tademaw nikakenihan idaw ku punuay a singkic atu kululay a singkic. . sakay mata a singkic u sakatusa nu sabaw tusa nu punu'a singkic, bangu 11, nu mata a singkic a puu' nu si-paw nipatahekalan u masatawasiay nu singkic a nikapulungan, kalingatuan u mata nu mapucuay, i labu nu mataan pasayda i nikuda muculil, mitusul tu singkic nu mata micumud i taban, saluimeng sat u masacipaay nu ayawan. II, .
S.PHON: == miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u a gaŇč***** == miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u a gaŇč, u t…ôban nu siŇčki ¶u a r~…ĺ…ôbawa nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, namaka sinki ¶ sinur~…ĺiaj nu si-paw a nikasumad nu adada. miduńß…ôpit i siŇčki ¶u a gaŇč ńßina tańß…ôkar~…ĺ i taŇčańß " paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu taŇčańß miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u a gaŇč, nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺ i dumaan nu siŇčki ¶uan, mańßida u namaka mataaj a siŇčki ¶. . t…ôban nu siŇčki ¶ u siŇčki ¶ a nika pur~…ĺuŇčan nu si-paw, itida i mutijuŇčaj nu ¶an ¶anan nu t…ôbanaj, ŇčaŇčaŇčan mikawawaj u misasiduma ( patudut, mi ¶iwkin, mikawaw) namaka udipaj nu i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a nikatajnian, mamir~…ĺawp…ôs atu miput tu udip nu maka ¶uwaaj a nikawawan, sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tan…ôŇčaj. . siukakaj nu aadupan, t…ôban a siŇčki ¶ itida i nikuda nu kur~…ĺur~…ĺan, pasu punu atu duus, ipunu Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu nu punuan, duus itida i t…ôban nu ukak, satańßap nu taŇčańß midiputaj tu punu Ē~ °, kur~…ĺur~…ĺ nu ukak midiput tu duus.i nai Ē~ °aj nu kur~…ĺur~…ĺan nu aadupan mańßida u mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj nu aadupan atu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj sa, aŇčaŇčaŇčan pasu bir~…ĺiaj nu siŇčki ¶an a siŇčki ¶ nu bata ¶an. . tad…ômaw nu ¶un-su-siŇčki ¶ papatid…ôŇčan u sakar~…ĺibutan u sakapańßaj, pi ¶…ôd…ôkan u punu Ē~ ° pankiw mar~…ĺi a baŇč…ôsan nu satar~…ĺakawaj a nikar~…ĺańßatan, mar~…ĺasiŇčki ¶ nu sakakaaj atu satar~…ĺakawaj, mińßusiw tu udiudipan nu sakata ¶uwa ¶uwa a misuŇčaaj tu kawawan, atu ¶i-ti atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu misasudanaj. . miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u a si-paw u ¶un-su-siŇčki ¶ atu r~…ĺiwir~…ĺw siŇčki ¶an a " ¶aajaj nu f…ôi-s…ôn- ¶in-jun-sipaw", ¶aaj ka sasuar~…ĺa tu diŇčkian. jadańß ku nuńß…ôni, sakaj udipan mańßida tu, u siŇčki ¶ patid…ôŇč patańß…ôkar~…ĺ atu sapidiputaw, itini i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw siŇčki ¶an mar~…ĺa suj- ¶aw. . itini i t…ôban nu siki ¶…ôan, miduńß…ôpitaj i siŇčki ¶an a si-paw pasu kua-tu- ¶ia- ¶…ô-si-paw, sin-s…ôn- ¶ia- ¶…ô-si-paw,s…ô-kun-si-paw atu s…ôaw- ¶ia- ¶…ô-si-paw, i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu siŇčki ¶, miduńß…ôpitaj i siŇčki ¶an a si-paw pasus…ô-wan-si-paw atu uj-sin-si-paw. mar~…ĺas…ôpat ku a aŇčaŇčaŇčan, (*) mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tu siŇčki ¶an tida satu, (*) pawsa tu iju atu jun i siŇčki ¶…ôan, (*) ujnian a siki ¶an atu duma a siŇčki ¶an ¶aaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß, (*) mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu itidaaj tu mamiasik tu mapatajaj a siŇčki ¶an. masasupaajaw ku siŇčki ¶, tu- ¶u Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin atu muńßanńßan tu sakaj udiudipan. . saan ku tad…ômaw u miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u si-paw mikis…ôn- ¶in-jun a nisausian **:*, nika ajda a nipikinkiwan nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan mikisaba tu *:* a siwkian. namańßida miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u si-paw idaw ku jadańßaj a si-paw jadańßaj atu kakakur~…ĺian, ina miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u si-paw tan…ôŇč misajadańß patańß…ôkar~…ĺ atu mikur~…ĺi tu siŇč-ki ¶ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. namańßida, tan…ôŇč ku nuńß…ôni ma ¶ajat tu nidat…ôŇčan a misiŇčan atu misatan…ôkt…ôk. miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u si-paw u mikinkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺu-taw-ńßu. fi…ô-…ô-saw mikir~…ĺim tu i punuaj masaatir~…ĺadaj ńß…ônaj i tida i **** mińß ¶aan makaadińß. ja sasakamu…ôn namaka si-r~…ĺa a kamuan **** atu ***** "miduńß…ôpitaj ", patu ¶…ôk tu nuńß…ônian i tawja a nika tin…ôŇčan u namaka siŇčki ¶…ôaj a nur~…ĺian. . siŇčki ¶ itida i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu siŇčki ¶an namaka nikabar~…ĺudan a masakaput nu mabar~…ĺudaj, nu ¶a ¶ajaj a siŇčki ¶an tan…ôŇč miar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj ńßatu jadańßaj nu siŇčki ¶an nikabar~…ĺud, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu siŇčki ¶an idaw ku mitabuaj tu siŇčki ¶an, ir~…ĺabu idaw ku siŇčki ¶ nu duńß…ôpi ¶aj sakar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu nika bar~…ĺudan. siŇčki ¶ masatawasiaj u siŇčki ¶ mamib…ôtas a masapu ¶uaj, ina masamib…ôtasaj masapu ¶uaj ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj matabuaj nu miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u, mamidiput atu mamiputaj. sisa inasiŇčki ¶ tan…ôŇč patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nituŇčińßan mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk namaka aadupan nu udip patajda i dumaan a udipan, kja tan…ôŇč idaw ku mamiu ¶ur~…ĺ atu sasakawawan. anuńßidan tu sakakawawan, u siŇčki ¶ tan…ôŇč makak…ônińß tu mi ¶umudaj a siŇčki ¶, tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj a siŇčki ¶ atu kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu siŇčki ¶. anu ńßidan u nikitidaan, u siŇčki ¶ nu tad…ômaw nikak…ônińßan idaw ku punuaj a siŇčki ¶ atu kur~…ĺur~…ĺaj a siŇčki ¶. . sakaj mata a siŇčki ¶ u sakatusa nu sabaw tusa nu punu Ē~ °a siŇčki ¶, baŇču **, nu mata a siŇčki ¶ a puu Ē~ ° nu si-paw nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan u masatawasiaj nu siŇčki ¶ a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan, kar~…ĺiŇčatuan u mata nu mapu ¶uaj, i r~…ĺabu nu mataan pasajda i nikuda mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, mitusur~…ĺ tu siŇčki ¶ nu mata mi ¶umud i taban, sar~…ĺuim…ôŇč sat u masa ¶ipaaj nu ajawan. ii, .
S.FORM: == miduhepit i sinkicu a gangÁ•ěÁ∂ďŤÜ†Ť≥™Áė§ == miduhepit i sinkicu a gang, u teban nu singkicu a lebawa nu imelang, namaka sinkic sinuliay nu si-paw a nikasumad nu adada. miduhepit i singkicu a gang hina tahekal i tangah " pangangan han tu tangah miduhepit i sinkicu a gang, nika tahekal i dumaan nu singkicuan, mahida u namaka mataay a singkic. . teban nu singkic u singkic a nika pulungan nu si-paw, itida i mutiyungay nu cancanan nu tebanay, ngangangan mikawaway u misasiduma ( patudut, miciwkin, mikawaw) namaka udipay nu icuwacuwaay a nikataynian, mamilawpes atu miput tu udip nu makacuwaay a nikawawan, sakatahekal nu tanengay. . siukakay nu aadupan, teban a singkic itida i nikuda nu kululan, pasu punu atu duus, ipunu' i labu nu punuan, duus itida i teban nu ukak, satahap nu tangah midiputay tu punu', kulul nu ukak midiput tu duus.i nai'ay nu kululan nu aadupan mahida u mamulmulay nu aadupan atu cilekay sa, angangangan pasu biliay nu singkican a singkic nu batacan. . tademaw nu cun-su-singkic papatidengan u sakalibutan u sakapahay, picedekan u punu' pankiw mali a bangesan nu satalakaway a nikalahatan, malasingkic nu sakakaay atu satalakaway, mihusiw tu udiudipan nu sakatacuwacuwa a misungaay tu kawawan, atu ci-ti atu hekalay a milecad atu misasudanay. . miduhepit i sinkicu a si-paw u cun-su-singkic atu liwilw singkican a " caayay nu fei-sen-cin-yun-sipaw", caay ka sasuala tu dingkian. yadah ku nuheni, sakay udipan mahida tu, u singkic patideng patahekal atu sapidiputaw, itini i liwliw singkican mala suy-caw. . itini i teban nu sikicean, miduhepitay i singkican a si-paw pasu kua-tu-cia-ce-si-paw, sin-sen- cia-ce-si-paw,se-kun-si-paw atu seaw-cia-ce-si-paw, i liwliw nu singkic, miduhepitay i singkican a si-paw pasuse-wan-si-paw atu uy-sin-si-paw. malasepat ku a angangangan, (1) miliwliw tu singkican tida satu, (2) pawsa tu iyu atu yun i singkicean, (3) uynian a sikican atu duma a singkican caay ka lalitemuh, (4) milawpes tu itidaay tu mamiasik tu mapatayay a singkican. masasupaayaw ku singkic, tu-cu' malalitin atu muhanhan tu sakay udiudipan. . saan ku tademaw u miduhepit i sinkicu si-paw mikisen-cin-yun a nisausian 10:1, nika ayda a nipikinkiwan nipatahekalan mikisaba tu 1:1 a siwkian. namahida miduhepit i sinkicu si-paw idaw ku yadahay a si-paw yadahay atu kakakulian, ina miduhepit i sinkicu si-paw taneng misayadah patahekal atu mikuli tu sing-kic muculil. namahida, taneng ku nuheni macayat tu nidatengan a misingan atu misatanektek. miduhepit i sinkicu si-paw u mikinkiway tu imelangay a sitangahay a tademaw ci Lu-taw-hu. Fie-e-saw mikilim tu i punuay masaatiladay henay i tida i 1856 mihcaan makaadih. ya sasakamuen namaka Si-la a kamuan ő≥őĽőĮőĪ atu ő≥őĽőŅőĮőĪ "miduhepitay ", patucek tu nuhenian i tawya a nika tinengan u namaka singkiceay a nulian. . singkic itida i liklik nu singkican namaka nikabaludan a masakaput nu mabaluday, nu cacayay a singkican taneng miala tu cacay hatu yadahay nu singkican nikabalud, hekal nu singkican idaw ku mitabuay tu singkican, ilabu idaw ku singkic nu duhepicay sakalaliyas tu nika baludan. singkic masatawasiay u singkic mamibetas a masapucuay, ina masamibetasay masapucuay ihekalay matabuay nu miduhepit i sinkicu, mamidiput atu mamiputay. sisa inasingkic taneng patahekal tu nitungihan malucek namaka aadupan nu udip patayda i dumaan a udipan, kya taneng idaw ku mamiucul atu sasakawawan. anuhidan tu sakakawawan, u singkic taneng makakenih tu micumuday a singkic, tahekalay a singkic atu kapulungan nu singkic. anu hidan u nikitidaan, u singkic nu tademaw nikakenihan idaw ku punuay a singkic atu kululay a singkic. . sakay mata a singkic u sakatusa nu sabaw tusa nu punu'a singkic, bangu 11, nu mata a singkic a puu' nu si-paw nipatahekalan u masatawasiay nu singkic a nikapulungan, kalingatuan u mata nu mapucuay, i labu nu mataan pasayda i nikuda muculil, mitusul tu singkic nu mata micumud i taban, saluimeng sat u masacipaay nu ayawan. II, .

atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu misasudanaj. . miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u a si-paw u ¶un-su-siŇčki ¶ atu r~…ĺiwir~…ĺw siŇčki ¶an a " ¶aajaj nu f…ôi-s…ôn- ¶in-jun-sipaw", ¶aaj ka sasuar~…ĺa tu ¶aaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß, (*) mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu itidaaj tu mamiasik tu mapatajaj a siŇčki ¶an. masasupaajaw ku siŇčki ¶, tu- ¶u Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin atu muńßanńßan tu sakaj udiudipan. . saan ku tad…ômaw u miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u si-paw mikis…ôn- ¶in-jun a nisausian **:*, nika ajda a nipikinkiwan nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan mikisaba tu *:* a siwkian. namańßida miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u si-paw idaw ku jadańßaj a si-paw jadańßaj atu kakakur~…ĺian, ina miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u si-paw tan…ôŇč misajadańß patańß…ôkar~…ĺ atu mikur~…ĺi tu siŇč-ki ¶ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. namańßida, tan…ôŇč ku nuńß…ôni ma ¶ajat tu nidat…ôŇčan a misiŇčan atu misatan…ôkt…ôk. miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u si-paw u mikinkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺu-taw-ńßu. fi…ô-…ô-saw mikir~…ĺim tu i punuaj masaatir~…ĺadaj ńß…ônaj i tida i **** mińß ¶aan makaadińß. ja sasakamu…ôn namaka si-r~…ĺa a kamuan **** atu ***** "miduńß…ôpitaj ", patu ¶…ôk tu nuńß…ônian i tawja a nika tin…ôŇčan u namaka siŇčki ¶…ôaj a nur~…ĺian. . siŇčki ¶ itida i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu siŇčki ¶an namaka nikabar~…ĺudan a masakaput nu mabar~…ĺudaj, nu ¶a ¶ajaj a siŇčki ¶an tan…ôŇč miar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj ńßatu jadańßaj nu siŇčki ¶an nikabar~…ĺud, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu siŇčki ¶an idaw ku mitabuaj tu siŇčki ¶an, ir~…ĺabu idaw ku siŇčki ¶ nu duńß…ôpi ¶aj sakar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu nika bar~…ĺudan. siŇčki ¶ masatawasiaj u siŇčki ¶ mamib…ôtas a masapu ¶uaj, ina masamib…ôtasaj masapu ¶uaj ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj matabuaj nu miduńß…ôpit i sinki ¶u, mamidiput atu mamiputaj. sisa inasiŇčki ¶ tan…ôŇč patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nituŇčińßan mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk namaka aadupan nu udip patajda i dumaan a udipan, kja tan…ôŇč idaw ku mamiu ¶ur~…ĺ atu sasakawawan. anuńßidan tu sakakawawan, u siŇčki ¶ tan…ôŇč makak…ônińß tu mi ¶umudaj a siŇčki ¶, tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj a siŇčki ¶ atu kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu siŇčki ¶. anu ńßidan u nikitidaan, u siŇčki ¶ nu tad…ômaw nikak…ônińßan idaw ku punuaj a siŇčki ¶ atu kur~…ĺur~…ĺaj a siŇčki ¶. . sakaj mata a siŇčki ¶ u sakatusa nu sabaw tusa nu punu Ē~ °a siŇčki ¶, baŇču **, nu mata a siŇčki ¶ a puu Ē~ ° nu si-paw nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan u masatawasiaj nu siŇčki ¶ a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan, kar~…ĺiŇčatuan u mata nu mapu ¶uaj, i r~…ĺabu nu mataan pasajda i nikuda mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, mitusur~…ĺ tu siŇčki ¶ nu mata mi ¶umud i taban, sar~…ĺuim…ôŇč sat u masa ¶ipaaj nu ajawan. ii, .
